The vector database landscape has matured significantly over the past two years. Qdrant has emerged as a popular open-source choice, particularly for teams that value performance and want full control over their infrastructure. Weaviate, with its knowledge-graph heritage, is often selected when teams need hybrid search across structured and unstructured data. Pinecone remains the safest managed option for organizations that prefer to outsource operational complexity. A useful overview is available at https://www.gartner.com/en/articles/vector-database-comparison.
